cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Namaste Chandravati Devi ji! This is Ramesh from All Nippon Airways. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm a bit worried, actually. I was expecting a call about my lost baggage. It's been a few days, and I haven't heard anything.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I completely understand your concern, Chandravati Devi ji. I'm calling to give you an update on your lost baggage claim. Our team has been working diligently to locate your bag.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, thank you so much! I really appreciate it. Can you please tell me what's happening with my bag?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, ji. We've searched extensively, and our team is still trying to locate it. If we can't find it within the next 24 hours, we'll provide you with a refund or replacement options, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds great, thank you. What do I need to do next? Do I need to provide any more information or documentation?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Not at this moment, Chandravati Devi ji. We just need you to be patient for a little while longer. We'll keep you updated on the progress. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us anytime, Haan?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. I just want my bag back, sir. It had all my important stuff in it.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 81s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from [AIRLINE_COMPANY] calls a passenger regarding their lost baggage claim. The agent provides an update on the search and informs them of the next steps in the process.
